kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: At most one member of the Market Ward goes with (Cooper or Blacksmith).
Southgate goes with exactly two of Cedric, Carpenter, and 13 coins.
At least one member of the Joiners' Guild is in the Market Ward.
Either 5 coins goes with Blacksmith or someone in the Market Ward goes with Blacksmith.
Edmund and the Carpenter are in different sides of town.
Exactly one of these is true: Beatrix goes with Cooper; Wulfric goes with Kingsford; Carpenter goes with 5 coins.
If either 13 coins does not go with Carpenter or Cooper goes with Eastcheap, then both Aldric goes with Potter and Highrow goes with Blacksmith.
Exactly two members of the Joiners' Guild are in the South Side.
The Fletcher and Edmund are in different sides of town.
Cedric goes with exactly two of Blacksmith, Millpond, and 9 coins.
Kingsford, 5 coins, and 11 coins go with Blacksmith, Potter, and Weaver, in some order.
Aldric, Beatrix, and Wulfric go with Cooper, Southgate, and 3 coins, in some order.
Cooper goes with either Eastcheap or Kingsford.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: At most one member of the South Watershed goes with (Bass or Carp).
Willowmere goes with exactly two of Dale, Bluegill, and 8 lb.
At least one member of the Pike Family is in the South Watershed.
Either 4 lb goes with Bass or someone in the South Watershed goes with Bass.
Esther and the angler who landed the Bluegill are in different basins.
Exactly one of these is true: Cody goes with Carp; Wade goes with Mossbank; Bluegill goes with 4 lb.
If either 8 lb does not go with Bluegill or Carp goes with Birchpool, then both Boone goes with Perch and Cedarmere goes with Bass.
Exactly two members of the Pike Family are in the Lowland Basin.
The angler who landed the Catfish and Esther are in different basins.
Dale goes with exactly two of Bass, Pinehollow, and 6 lb.
Mossbank, 4 lb, and 7 lb go with Bass, Perch, and Trout, in some order.
Boone, Cody, and Wade go with Carp, Willowmere, and 3 lb, in some order.
Carp goes with either Birchpool or Mossbank.
